category_sources: source_facts.description: DNS server that chains plugins; official CoreDNS site says CoreDNS is a DNS server written in Go that chains plugins
display_name_sources: Official CoreDNS site and GitHub organization use CoreDNS at https://coredns.io/ and https://github.com/coredns/coredns
docs_sources: Official CoreDNS homepage links to the Manual; official manual is under https://coredns.io/manual/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/coredns/coredns; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a plugin-chain DNS server; official CoreDNS site describes DNS, plugins, service discovery, Kubernetes, and Go
